category_sources: source_facts.description says tomee-plus includes TomEE Web Profile plus JAX-RS and more; source_facts.homepage is the official Apache TomEE site.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is tomee-plus and source_facts.homepage identifies the Apache TomEE project; the source archive classifier is plus.
docs_sources: Official Apache TomEE documentation page at tomee.apache.org/latest/docs/documentation.html.
repo_sources: Official Apache TomEE sources page says TomEE is on GitHub at https://github.com/apache/tomee and also lists Apache Git master sources.
tags_sources: source_facts.description references TomEE Web Profile and JAX-RS; source_facts.homepage identifies Apache TomEE.
